title: Retro Agent Result
description: Structured output from the retro agent, validated by the harness before the post-script runs (ADR 0022).

summary.description: Markdown summary to post as a comment on the originating PR/issue. Links to each filed proposal issue.

proposals.description: List of improvement proposals. Each becomes a GitHub issue.

target_repo.description: Full owner/repo where the issue should be filed.

what_happened.description: Timeline of events with links to logs, PR comments, and agent runs.

what_could_go_better.description: Improvement opportunities with honest uncertainty assessment.

proposed_change.description: What to change and where, specific enough for an implementer to act on.

validation_criteria.description: How to know the change had the desired effect. Measurable or observable outcomes.
